stories.title: CIA chief visits Cuba as energy crisis worsens
stories.summary: The reported visit to Havana came after the US renewed an offer of aid to ease the effects of its oil blockade.

stories.title: Why Modi wants Indians to buy less gold and take fewer foreign holidays
stories.summary: Modi has urged Indians to save dollars as war and oil shocks strain the rupee and economy further this year.

stories.title: India hikes fuel prices as Iran crisis bites
stories.summary: The world's third-largest oil importer announced increased fuel prices and austerity measures due to the energy crisis.

stories.title: Strategy’s STRC hits record $1.5B trading volume
stories.summary: Strategy has leaned on Stretch to fund Bitcoin buys over the past 12 months as funding through senior convertible notes and at-the-market equity offerings has tightened.

stories.title: UK politician Nigel Farage bought $1.8M house after $6.7M crypto gift
stories.summary: The news follows growing calls from UK lawmakers and government officials to curb or temporarily ban crypto political donations in the country.

stories.title: Bitcoin holds key support for $85K breakout as S&P 500 hits new all-time high
stories.summary: Bitcoin entered recovery mode after inflation-induced losses, while US stocks shook off macro data with broader risk appetite "skyrocketing."

stories.title: Trump says he 'made no commitment either way' to Xi on Taiwan
stories.summary: Trump said Xi Jinping had asked directly if the US would defend Taiwan, and he had responded, "I don't talk about that".

stories.title: Watch: What did we learn from Trump's visit to China?
stories.summary: President Trump has concluded a two-day visit to Beijing at a high-stakes summit with Chinese leader Xi Jinping.

stories.title: Trump says he discussed Taiwan arms sale with China’s Xi Jinping
stories.summary: US President Donald Trump said he discussed US arms sales to Taiwan with Chinese leader Xi Jinping.

stories.title: Trump-Xi summit: China, US disagree on what they agreed on
stories.summary: US touted trade deals; China said it warned Washington over Taiwan. Neither side confirmed the other's claims.

stories.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
stories.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

stories.title: Polish lawmakers back revised crypto bill after repeated vetoes
stories.summary: Polish lawmakers approve a Ministry of Finance-backed crypto bill to implement the EU MiCA framework in a 241–200 vote after repeated vetoes.

stories.title: Bitcoin stalls above $80K despite CLARITY Act pass: What will trigger a breakout?
stories.summary: Bitcoin’s break above $82,000 and a return of strong institutional demand are prerequisites to confirm a trend change for BTC price.

stories.title: Bitcoin risks ‘next downtrend’ as traders diverge on fate of $82K resistance
stories.summary: Bitcoin traders split between a "massive catch-up" with stocks and the start of its "next downtrend" as BTC price action failed to flip $82,000 to support.

stories.title: THORChain pauses trading after suspected $10M exploit
stories.summary: THORChain paused trading after ZachXBT flagged a suspected $10 million exploit spanning Bitcoin, Ethereum, BNB Chain and Base.

stories.title: OKX reportedly eyes Coinone stake in South Korea push
stories.summary: OKX is reportedly seeking a 20% stake in South Korean crypto exchange Coinone as foreign and domestic firms compete for market access.

stories.title: Hana Financial to acquire 6.55% stake in Upbit operator Dunamu for $668M
stories.summary: The purchase makes Hana Financial the fourth-largest shareholder in Dunamu, following several crypto-related deals in the last two months, as it dives deeper into the digital assets sector.

stories.title: Australia’s proposed CGT changes could discourage long-term crypto holding
stories.summary: Robin Singh, CEO and founder of Koinly said the changes will hurt low-income crypto investors most and could encourage more short-term trading.

stories.title: Kraken joins LayerZero exodus as it switches to Chainlink CCIP
stories.summary: LayerZero has come under scrutiny since it was exploited in April, as crypto protocols reevaluate their cross-chain providers and seek safer alternatives.

stories.title: Bullish shares dip on Q1 earnings miss, $605M loss
stories.summary: Bullish stock dropped in trading with the crypto exchange’s first-quarter earnings miss, adding to the crypto companies that have underperformed in the quarter.

stories.title: Crypto data company Dune cuts 25% of staff in restructuring
stories.summary: Dune co-founder and CEO Fredrik Haga says the company’s staff cuts come as it shifts focus and is “all-in” on AI and institutional interest in crypto.

stories.title: Strive rallies 5.8% as it clears debt in Q1, unveils daily dividends
stories.summary: Strive reported a net loss of $265.9 million for Q1, which it attributed to the fall in market value of its Bitcoin holdings, but saw its shares on its move to pay SATA holders dividends every business day starting in June.

stories.title: Dartmouth endowment invests in Solana ETF, holds $14M in crypto exposure
stories.summary: The unversity’s endowment disclosed holdings in the Bitwise Solana staking ETF, Grayscale Ethereum staking ETF and BlackRock’s iShares Bitcoin ETF.

stories.title: Bitcoin trades at a 'discount' on Coinbase: Is a $76K retest next?
stories.summary: Bitcoin’s $79,000 defense proves that the Coinbase discount is driven by stablecoin volatility rather than a lack of institutional demand.

gold.label: Greed
gold.source: Gold news and safe-haven demand model
